global.description: An ad for the brand that features a solid background covering the full canvas, providing a clean and unified look. In the top left corner, the 'PixelForge' logo is prominently displayed inside a light green rounded rectangle, set against a green background with jagged shapes, creating a dynamic and modern feel. The upper part of the ad is decorated with a grid of light green rounded squares, each with a thin white border and a small dark green circle in the top left corner. These squares are arranged in a pattern that adds a sense of order and structure. A green diagonal shape, consisting of two intersecting triangles, is located in the top left area, adding a layered effect to the visual composition. A white play triangle is positioned in the upper right area, suggesting interactivity or a call to action. Near the center of the ad, a small light green circle and several green and dark green circles are scattered, providing a playful and engaging element to the design. The headline 'Unlock rare gear' in bold black text is centered on a light green background, with the smaller text 'Play with friends tonight' below it, conveying the main message of the ad. At the bottom, a black rectangular CTA button with rounded corners and the white text 'Watch now' invites the viewer to take action. The overall layout is balanced and visually appealing, with a clear hierarchy of information.
global.main_message: Unlock rare gear and play with friends tonight

elements.label: Solid background
elements.description: Solid background covering the full canvas.

elements.label: PixelForge Logo
elements.description: A black text 'PixelForge' inside a light green rounded rectangle, positioned in the top left corner of the ad against a green background with jagged shapes.

elements.label: Light Green Rounded Square
elements.description: A light green rounded square with a thin white border. Inside the square, in the top left corner, is a small dark green circle. Positioned in the upper part of the ad, it is part of a grid of similar shapes.

elements.label: Light Green Rounded Square
elements.description: A light green rounded square with a thin white outline, featuring a smaller dark green circle in the top left corner. Positioned in the upper central area of the ad, part of a grid of similar shapes.

elements.label: Green Rounded Square with Dot
elements.description: A light green rounded square with a darker green dot in the top left corner. Positioned towards the top center of the ad, part of a group of similar elements.

elements.label: Light Green Rounded Square
elements.description: A light green rounded square with a thin white border. Inside the square, there is a small dark green circle located in the top left corner. This element is positioned in the upper middle section of the ad, forming part of a grid of similar shapes.

elements.label: Green Diagonal Shape
elements.description: A green diagonal shape located in the top left area of the ad. It consists of two intersecting triangles, creating a sharp edge that points towards the center of the ad. The shape is part of the background design, adding a layered effect to the overall visual.

elements.label: White Play Triangle
elements.description: A white triangle pointing to the right, positioned in the upper right area of the ad. It is set against a green background, suggesting a play button or directional indicator.

elements.label: Light Green Circle
elements.description: A small light green circle located near the center of the ad, slightly to the left. It is positioned below a set of four outlined squares and above the headline text.

elements.label: Green Circle
elements.description: A small, solid green circle located near the center of the ad, slightly to the left. It is a simple decorative element without any additional features or text.

elements.label: Green Circle
elements.description: A small, solid green circle located near the center of the ad, slightly to the left. It appears as a decorative element against the lighter green background.

elements.label: Dark Green Circle
elements.description: A small dark green circle located near the center of the ad, slightly to the left. It appears as a simple decorative element against the lighter green background.

elements.label: Green Circle
elements.description: A small, solid green circle located towards the middle left of the ad. It is positioned near the four outlined squares and above the text 'Unlock rare gear'.

embedding_texts.global_text: An ad for the brand featuring a solid background, PixelForge logo, decorative elements, headline, and CTA button. The design is flat with high contrast, conveying excitement and engagement.
